description: Style NoteThis easy-to-wear T-shirt from spykar adds a bold brassy look to your wardrobe. Show off your urban style in this fashionably tailored piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair this versatile tee with dark denims and casual shoes.Product DetailsPink polo T-shirt with a spread collar, chest buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and embroidered branding on the left chestMaterial and Care96% cotton and 4% elastaneHand wash in cold water with mild detergentDo not soak, wring or twistDry in shadeFold and stack to maintain shapeModerate warm iron; Do not iron on print or embroiderySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
